meta.historyDescription: View all your payments and their status.
meta.walletDescription: See your wallet balance, recent activity, and money flow.

page.heading: Complete Payment
page.subheading: Review your session details and refund policy before paying.
page.sessionSummaryIntro: Review the session details before you pay.
page.amountDueNote: This amount reflects wallet use and any applied discounts.
page.policySectionIntro: Please read the refund policy before paying. By paying, you confirm that you have reviewed these clauses and agreed to them.
page.policyUnavailable: Payment cannot be completed right now because the refund policy is unavailable.
page.policyUnavailableNote: Please try again shortly or refresh the page.
page.policyValidationTitle: Could not verify the refund policy
page.policyValidationNote: There is a conflict in the policy data. Please refresh the page and try again.
page.policyUpdatedNote: The refund policy changed. Please review it again and accept it once more.
page.policyCheckboxLabel: I have read and accept the refund policy
page.policyCheckboxNote: Payment stays disabled until you accept the clauses.
page.policyMandatory: You must accept the refund policy before paying.
page.policyRequiredForPayment: Please review the refund policy below and accept it before paying.
page.sessionExpiredNote: The payment window for this session has closed. Please book a new slot.
page.sessionExpiredUnavailableNote: This payment page is no longer available because the reservation window has ended.
page.sessionExpiredRedirectNote: We will take you back to the practitioner page in a few seconds so you can choose a new time.
page.alreadyPaidNote: Payment has already been received and your session is secured.
page.redirectingToCheckout: We are sending you to the secure checkout page now.
page.paymentRequiredHeading: Review the session details and refund policy before paying.
page.paymentRequiredNote: Payment will only complete after you accept the refund policy.
page.sessionBlockedByPayment: Your session will not be confirmed until payment is completed successfully.
page.initiateError: Could not initiate payment. Please try again.
page.initiateConflict: An active payment already exists for this session. Please refresh and try again.

paymobMethod.heading: Payment method
paymobMethod.note: Choose one of the Paymob methods that is actually enabled on your merchant account.

card.title: Bank card
card.note: Pay with Visa, Mastercard, or any other card supported by your account.

wallet.title: Mobile wallet
wallet.note: Pay from a mobile wallet when it is enabled on your Paymob account.

journey.heading: What happens next
journey.note: We keep the checkout flow simple: review the booking, complete payment, then return here for confirmation.

review.title: Review
review.note: Check the session time, duration, and the amount due before you continue.

pay.title: Pay securely
pay.note: Your payment opens in a secure checkout, or inside the page when the gateway supports it.

confirm.title: Confirm
confirm.note: We bring you back here and update the session status automatically.

journey.hostedNote: If a separate payment page opens, finish the card details there and we will bring you back automatically.
journey.inlineNote: Your payment can be completed directly on this page when the gateway supports an embedded card form.

REFUND_PENDING.heading: Refund in Progress
REFUND_PENDING.note: A refund is being processed for this session. We will update your session status once it is finalized.

REFUNDED.heading: Refund Completed
REFUNDED.note: This session payment has already been refunded.

breakdown.heading: Price Summary
breakdown.couponInvalid: This coupon is not valid for this session.

checkout.heading: Pay with Card
checkout.note: Your payment is handled through a secure payment provider.
checkout.error: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.

confirmed.heading: Booking Confirmed
confirmed.note: Your payment was received and your session is confirmed.

verifying.heading: Verifying Payment...
verifying.note: We are checking your payment status. This only takes a moment.

pendingTimeout.heading: Payment is Processing
pendingTimeout.note: Your payment was submitted and is being finalized.
pendingTimeout.checkNote: Your booking will be confirmed automatically. Check your sessions page for the latest status.

failed.heading: Payment Failed
failed.note: Your payment could not be processed. Please check your card details and try again.

canceled.heading: Payment Cancelled
canceled.note: You cancelled the payment. Your slot may still be available, so try again before the payment window closes.

expired.heading: Payment Window Expired
expired.note: The reservation window for this slot has passed. Please book a new slot.

error.heading: Could Not Check Status
error.note: Please check your sessions page for the latest updates on your booking.

moneyStory.heading: What this payment means
moneyStory.note: The summary below reflects the final recorded amounts for this session.
moneyStory.expiredHeading: If you need to pay later
moneyStory.expiredNote: The slot expired before payment was finalized, so no successful charge was recorded.
moneyStory.cancelledNote: No completed charge was recorded. You can retry payment or check history later.
moneyStory.failedNote: No successful charge was completed. Your card or gateway was not confirmed.
moneyStory.pendingHeading: If the payment is still settling
moneyStory.pendingNote: The booking is still finalizing. Check sessions and payment history for the latest state.
moneyStory.verifyingNote: We are still waiting for the payment result to settle, so the session may update shortly.

net.label: Final amount
net.helper: The amount recorded for this booking.

where.label: Where to confirm
where.helper: Wallet and history will show any later money movement.

history.heading: Payment History
history.emptyNote: Your payments will appear here after you book and pay for a session.

notes.CREATED: Your payment was started but is not complete yet.
notes.PENDING: Your payment is being processed. Check again shortly if it does not update.
notes.REQUIRES_ACTION: Your payment needs one more step to finish successfully.
notes.AUTHORIZED: Your payment was authorized and is being finalized.
notes.CAPTURED: Payment was received successfully and your session is secured.
notes.FAILED: This payment did not go through. You can try again if the session is still payable.
notes.CANCELLED: This payment attempt was cancelled before it was completed.
notes.EXPIRED: This payment attempt expired before it was completed.
notes.REFUND_PENDING: A refund is currently being processed for this payment.
notes.PARTIALLY_REFUNDED: Part of this payment has already been refunded.
notes.REFUNDED: This payment has been refunded in full.

history.refundClarification: Refund-related items stay visible here so you can follow the final result in one place.

wallet.refundHint: Refunded amounts are returned to this internal balance.

moneyStory.heading: How to read your payment history
moneyStory.note: This page keeps wallet, gateway, and refund movement in one place so you do not need to stitch it together elsewhere.

gatewayBacked.label: Gateway-backed payments
gatewayBacked.helper: Payments that charged through the payment provider.

mixed.label: Mixed payments
mixed.helper: Payments that used both wallet and gateway.

refund.label: Refund-related items
refund.helper: Payments that are refunded or still settling.

walletPage.heading: Your wallet, balance, and activity
walletPage.note: Use this page to understand what is available, what is reserved, and how your wallet changed over time.

metrics.availableHint: Can be used for eligible payments
metrics.creditedHint: Total money added to the wallet

walletPage.activityNote: These entries show how your wallet moved over time.

activityEmpty.heading: No wallet activity yet
activityEmpty.note: Your wallet activity will appear here after refunds, credits, or wallet-based payments.

sidebar.heading: What this page means
sidebar.note: This page is for patients who want a simple view of wallet balances and recent ledger activity.
sidebar.currencyNote: Your wallet uses the currency that matches your account market.
sidebar.updateNote: The balance here is synced from your wallet ledger.
sidebar.noActivity: No wallet activity has been recorded yet.

clarity.heading: Wallet balance, explained simply
clarity.note: Available is money you can use now. Reserved is money held for a payment that is still settling.

available.label: Available balance
available.helper: Ready for eligible payments or refunds.

reserved.label: Reserved balance
reserved.helper: Released when the related payment finishes.

error.heading: Wallet is not available right now
error.note: We could not load your wallet summary. Please try again.

empty.heading: No wallet yet
empty.note: Your wallet will appear when your account has wallet activity.

walletCheckout.heading: How this payment will be split
walletCheckout.useWalletNote: Apply your available wallet balance before card checkout.
walletCheckout.currencyMismatch: Your wallet currency does not match this session currency, so wallet balance cannot be used here.
walletCheckout.gatewayChargeHint: Amount that will be charged by the payment provider.

PENDING_PAYMENT.label: Payment still needed
PENDING_PAYMENT.note: Your slot is not secured yet. Complete payment now so the session can be confirmed.

SECURED.label: Payment received
SECURED.note: Your payment was received successfully and this session is secured.

REFUND_PENDING.label: Refund in progress
REFUND_PENDING.note: A refund is being processed for this session. It is no longer available to continue.

REFUNDED.label: Refund completed
REFUNDED.note: This session payment has been refunded.

EXPIRED.label: Payment window ended
EXPIRED.note: The payment window ended before this session could be confirmed.

notes.PENDING_PAYMENT: This session is still waiting for payment. Complete payment now so it can be confirmed.
notes.SECURED: Payment was received successfully and this session is secured.
notes.REFUND_PENDING: A refund is currently being processed for this session.
notes.REFUNDED: This session payment has already been refunded.
notes.EXPIRED: The payment window ended before this session could be confirmed.
